props.title: Retry and Recovery
props.description: When ingest fails, move to degraded mode and replay

props.label: Alarm: Ingest Error Rate
props.description: CloudWatch alarm fires when >5% events fail

props.label: Retry Handler
props.comment: Retries failed records with bounded backoff

props.label: Recovered
props.body: If retry succeeds, metrics are cleared and downstream ingestion resumes.

props.label: Degraded Mode
props.body: After retry exhaustion, route to stale-cache parser and open a replay ticket.

props.label: Replay Dashboard
props.description: Inspect failed batches and trigger replay workflows
